heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/41/2014.5_Aston_Martin_DB9_in_Lightning_Silver%2C_front_left.jpg/1920px-2014.5 Aston Martin DB9 in Lightning Silver, front left.jpg
description: The Aston Martin DB9, produced from 2004 to 2016, was the first Aston Martin built on the VH aluminium platform. Its hand-assembled 6.0-litre V12 producing up to 540 bhp in GT spec, combined with Ian Callum's timeless design, defined a generation of British grand touring. Manual gearbox cars are rare and increasingly sought after.
